Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I was glad to be able to see him again. Even if it was just from behind...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}That was obviously Aigis's memory just now... But what's it mean?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I guess that was supposed to be her reason for awakening? But she already had a Persona.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}She didn't awaken to that one... She awakened to the Persona abilities that he had.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Aigis, what was that memory? And when did it happen?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}It's... where I would always wake up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}It was so painful losing him... I couldn't bring myself to do anything, so... I just hid in my room.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}For a while, I did nothing but chase after him in my dreams...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Eventually, I stopped having dreams at all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}It felt like the weight on my chest was lightening... until it was lifted entirely.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}What we saw just now... must have been the last time I had that dream.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}But honestly, I don't know why that would be my "reason"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}The person we saw in your dream... He's the one with the same power as you, isn't he?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}So that's what's supposed to have caused all this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}We only saw it in my sister's memory... but all of you want to see him again, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}If that's the case... then the conclusion is simple.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}I guess what I said at the beginning was right after all...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Eliminating all of you... would have been the fastest way to solve this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}A monster is coming... Your regrets themselves, given form.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}The Abyss of Time not disappearing, Shadows being present within it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}What you see now is a being of your own creation.[n]{f 1 1}
